role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The fund has adopted a policy pursuant to Rule 35d-1 under the 1940 Act to invest, under normal circumstances, at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in investments that provide exposure to the iShares Russell 2000 ETF. The fund is non-diversified.

The fund is non-diversified.
